abort.mqtt_not_configured: MQTT integration is required for Nubly.
abort.missing_device_id: Discovered device did not advertise a device_id.
abort.already_configured: This Nubly device is already configured.

error.supervisor_unavailable: Home Assistant Supervisor is not available — automatic Mosquitto provisioning requires HAOS or Supervised.
error.mosquitto_user_add_failed: Could not add the MQTT user to the Mosquitto add-on. Check Supervisor logs.
error.mosquitto_restart_failed: Could not restart the Mosquitto add-on. Check Supervisor logs.
error.mqtt_reconnect_timeout: MQTT did not reconnect after the Mosquitto restart. Try again in a moment.
error.mqtt_publish_not_ready: MQTT reconnected but is not yet accepting publishes. Try again in a moment.
error.provisioning_failed: Could not provision the Nubly device — check that it is online and reachable on the network.

onboard.title: Add Nubly device
onboard.description: Device {device_id}. After adding, open the integration's Configure menu to set up lights, media, scenes, and the screensaver.

general.title: General
general.description: Set the room name shown on the device.

lights.title: Lights
lights.description: Pick the lights to expose on this device. You'll set their labels and icons on the next page.

lights_detail.title: Light labels
lights_detail.description: Set a display name and optional icon for: {entities}

media.title: Media player
media.description: Select the media_player to show on the media screen. When a Sonos player is chosen, favorites are auto-discovered from that player.

data_description.favorites_enabled: Only effective when the selected media_player is a Sonos device.
data_description.favorites_max: Caps the runtime list size sent to the device.

weather.title: Weather & ambient sensors
weather.description: Optional weather entity and room temperature/humidity sensors.

screensaver.title: Screensaver
screensaver.description: Enable the screensaver, pick a type, and set the idle timeout.

screen_order.title: Choose screen order
screen_order.description: Choose the order screens appear when swiping.

data_description.order: Selection order is the swipe order. Unselected screens are hidden.

scenes.title: Scene buttons
scenes.description: Configure up to {count} scene buttons. Each row binds one button to a Home Assistant scene or script.

error.entity_not_found: The selected entity does not exist in Home Assistant.
